description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior features a combination of white and brown surfaces, with large glass windows on the front facade allowing ample natural light into the living spaces. The property is surrounded by a low boundary wall and includes a green lawn area, with a driveway leading up to the main entrance. The front of the bungalow showcases a prominent glass section, likely for a living or dining area, and a smaller, partially enclosed porch or patio space. The rear and side elevations are more private, with fewer windows and solid wall sections. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and contemporary, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, two-story flat-roofed bungalow with large front glass windows, white and brown exterior, and a surrounding lawn and driveway.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid white wall, small windows, and a partially enclosed patio area.
description_view_1: Side view with a clear view of the driveway, boundary wall, and a glimpse of the interior through large windows.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the large glass windows, main entrance, and the driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_3: Rear view with a mostly solid white wall, minimal windows, and a green lawn area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing windows and minimal side windows
